overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe down a river through a mountainous canyon. The journey progresses from a narrow canyon toward a distinctive rock arch formation, then continues into a darker, forested canyon section.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: paddling a canoe steadily downstream through the narrow canyon, heading toward the distant rock arch

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising directly from the water
tall gray rock formation with layered sedimentary texture
distant mountain range with white snow visible on summits against blue sky
distinctive natural stone arch formation visible in the distance ahead
scattered evergreen trees growing along the canyon rim and banks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow river canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The character paddles a canoe forward through calm waters toward a distinctive rock arch visible in the distance, with snow-capped mountains framing the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider river section approaching large rock arch landmark

events.description: canoe paddles closer to the large rock arch formation, which dominates the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: paddling toward and alongside the distinctive rock arch, navigating slightly toward the right bank

segments.scene_description: The river widens as the canoe approaches the massive rock arch formation. The arch grows from a distant landmark to a dominant feature on the right side as the character paddles past it, with the left canyon wall receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker forested canyon with faster current

events.description: passing the rock arch and entering a darker, more enclosed canyon section ahead
lighting becomes noticeably darker as the canyon walls rise and block direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: paddling away from the arch into a darker, narrower canyon with visible white water rapids

entered.detail: shadowed canyon entrance with dense pine forest and tall cliffs blocking the sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the rock arch behind, the canoe enters a darker, more enclosed section of the canyon. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows as tall cliffs rise on both sides, and the river shows signs of faster current with small rapids ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey down a river that transitions from a bright, open canyon into a shadowed, enclosed gorge. It begins with a canoe paddling through calm waters between steep rock walls, moving toward a distant rock arch framed by snow-capped mountains. As the river widens, the arch grows from a far-off landmark into a dominant feature on the right before the canoe glides past it and the opposite canyon wall recedes. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the arch behind and enters a darker section of the canyon where the lighting fades into diffused shadows. Finally, the environment tightens with towering cliffs rising on both sides as the river current quickens into small rapids.
